channel.title: Flutter on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Flutter on Arrans github.io

item.title: rustdesk/rustdesk
item.description: An open-source remote desktop application designed for self-hosting, as an alternative to TeamViewer.

item.title: localsend/localsend
item.description: An open-source cross-platform alternative to AirDrop

item.title: wgh136/PicaComic
item.description: A comic app built with Flutter, supporting multiple comic sources.

item.title: AppFlowy-IO/AppFlowy
item.description: Bring projects, wikis, and teams together with AI. AppFlowy is the AI collaborative workspace where you achieve more without losing control of your data. The leading open source Notion alternative.

item.title: venera-app/venera
item.description: A comic app

item.title: leanflutter/awesome-flutter-desktop
item.description: A curated list of awesome things related to Flutter desktop.

item.title: KRTirtho/spotube
item.description: 🎧 Open source music streaming app! Available for both desktop & mobile!

item.title: ente-io/ente
item.description: 💚 End-to-end encrypted cloud for everything.

item.title: GopeedLab/gopeed
item.description: A fast, modern download manager for HTTP, BitTorrent, Magnet, and ed2k. Cross-platform, built with Golang and Flutter.

item.title: brandonp2412/Flexify
item.description: 💪 Track your gym progress and flex on people

item.title: subosito/flutter-action
item.description: Flutter environment for use in GitHub Actions. It works on Linux, Windows, and macOS.

item.title: Solido/awesome-flutter
item.description: An awesome list that curates the best Flutter libraries, tools, tutorials, articles and more.

item.title: lollipopkit/flutter_server_box
item.description: ServerBox - server status & toolbox

item.title: go-vikunja/app
item.description: Cross-Platform app for Vikunja

item.title: owlistic-notes/owlistic
item.description: 🦉 Free open-source notetaking app with real-time sync 🔄⚡️🚀

item.title: Koukobin/Ermis
item.description: Ermis: A decentralized, secure and open-source messaging platform for real-time communication.

item.title: isar/isar
item.description: Extremely fast, easy to use, and fully async NoSQL database for Flutter

item.title: fluttercandies/waterfall_flow
item.description: A Flutter grid view which supports waterfall flow layout.

item.title: bluefireteam/audioplayers
item.description: A Flutter package to play multiple audio files simultaneously (Android/iOS/web/Linux/Windows/macOS)

item.title: go-flutter-desktop/go-flutter
item.description: Flutter on Windows, MacOS and Linux - based on Flutter Embedding, Go and GLFW.

item.title: prateekmedia/pstube
item.description: Watch and download videos without ads

item.title: AppFlowy-IO/appflowy-editor
item.description: A highly customizable rich-text editor for Flutter. The AppFlowy Editor project for AppFlowy and beyond.

item.title: VeryGoodOpenSource/very_good_templates
item.description: Collection of open-source templates created and maintained by Very Good Ventures.

item.title: thunder-app/thunder
item.description: An open-source cross-platform Lemmy & PieFed client for iOS and Android

item.title: YehudaKremer/msix
item.description: Create Msix installer for flutter windows-build files.

item.title: flutter/gallery
item.description: Flutter Gallery was a resource to help developers evaluate and use Flutter

item.title: objectbox/objectbox-dart
item.description: Flutter database for super-fast Dart object persistence

item.title: Yubico/yubioath-flutter
item.description: Yubico Authenticator for Desktop (Windows, macOS and Linux) and Android

item.title: singerdmx/flutter-quill
item.description: Rich text editor for Flutter

item.title: vintage/scratcher
item.description: Scratch card widget which temporarily hides content from user.

item.title: authpass/authpass
item.description: AuthPass - Password Manager based on Flutter for all platforms. Keepass 2.x (KDBX 3 and KDBX 4) compatible.

item.title: picguard/picguard
item.description: Your pictures, your signature.

item.title: leoafarias/fvm
item.description: Flutter Version Management: A simple CLI to manage Flutter SDK versions.

item.title: foss42/apidash
item.description: API Dash is a beautiful AI-powered open-source cross-platform (Desktop & Mobile) API Client built using Flutter which can help you easily create & customize your HTTP & GraphQL API requests, visually inspect responses and generate API integration code. A lightweight alternative to postman/insomnia.

item.title: linagora/tmail-flutter
item.description: A multi-platform (Flutter) application for reading your emails, with your favorite devices, using the JMAP protocol!

item.title: simolus3/drift
item.description: Drift is an easy to use, reactive, typesafe persistence library for Dart & Flutter.

item.title: gonuit/flutter-custom-refresh-indicator
item.description: Widget that makes it easy to implement a custom pull to refresh gesture.

item.title: SimformSolutionsPvtLtd/chatview
item.description: Highly customisable chat UI with reply and reaction functionality.

item.title: flyerhq/flutter_chat_ui
item.description: Free and open-source chat SDK. Build fast, real-time apps and generative AI agents with a high-performance, customizable, cross-platform UI.

item.title: TerminalStudio/xterm.dart
item.description: 💻 xterm.dart is a fast and fully-featured terminal emulator for Flutter, with support for mobile and desktop platforms.

item.title: SebastienBtr/Dash-Chat-2
item.description: The most complete Chat UI for flutter. Easy to use, highly customizable and fully featured

item.title: Flutter-Bounty-Hunters/super_editor
item.description: A Flutter toolkit for building document editors and readers

item.title: letsar/gap
item.description: Flutter widgets for easily adding gaps inside Flex widgets such as Columns and Rows or scrolling views

item.title: media-kit/media-kit
item.description: A cross-platform video player & audio player for Flutter & Dart.

item.title: keshav-space/safenotes
item.description: Safe Notes is a security project aimed at providing an encrypted, private note manager that works locally and protects notes from various threat actors.

item.title: PrintN/Human-Benchmark
item.description: Human Benchmark is a Flutter app for Android that features many tests to assess your abilities.

item.title: ubuntu-flutter-community/musicpod
item.description: Music, radio, television and podcast player for Ubuntu, MacOs and maybe soon Android

item.title: leanflutter/window_manager
item.description: The window_manager plugin provides comprehensive window management capabilities for Flutter desktop applications, enabling full control over window size, position, appearance, close behavior, and listening to events.

item.title: miquelbeltran/flutter95
item.description: Windows95 UI components for Flutter apps. Bring back the nostalgic look and feel of old operating systems with this set of UI components ready to use.

item.title: Kavantix/sliver_tools
item.description: A set of useful sliver tools that are missing from the flutter framework

item.title: bluefireteam/photo_view
item.description: 📸 Easy to use yet very customizable zoomable image widget for Flutter, Photo View provides a gesture sensitive zoomable widget. Photo View is largely used to show interacive images and other stuff such as SVG.

item.title: fastforgedev/fastforge
item.description: The ultimate all-in-one Flutter application packaging and distribution tool, providing a seamless solution for all your distribution needs.

item.title: Milad-Akarie/auto_route_library
item.description: Flutter route generator

item.title: lollipopkit/flutter_gpt_box
item.description: GPTBox - a third-party client for OpenAI API.

item.title: Sub6Resources/flutter_html
item.description: A Flutter widget for rendering static html as Flutter widgets (Will render over 80 different html tags!)

item.title: VB10/flutter-architecture-template
item.description: Flutter Architecture Complete App

item.title: BirjuVachhani/adaptive_theme
item.description: Easiest way to add support for light and dark theme in your flutter app.

item.title: fluttercandies/extended_tabs
item.description: A powerful official extension library of Tab/TabBar/TabView, which support to scroll ancestor or child Tabs when current is overscroll, and set scroll direction and cache extent.

item.title: sebastianhaberey/nsd
item.description: Flutter Network Service Discovery (NSD) Plugin

item.title: fleather-editor/fleather
item.description: Soft and gentle rich text editing for Flutter applications.

item.title: MaikuB/flutter_appauth
item.description: A Flutter wrapper for AppAuth iOS and Android SDKs

item.title: jama5262/jiffy
item.description: Jiffy is a Flutter (Android, IOS and Web) date time package for parsing, manipulating, querying and formatting dates

item.title: letsar/flutter_sticky_header
item.description: Flutter implementation of sticky headers for sliver

item.title: arran4/send_to_linkwarden
item.description: Mobile version of Linkwarden

item.title: antler119/system_tray
item.description: A Flutter package that makes it easy to customize and work with your Flutter desktop app’s system tray.

item.title: arran4/mlocate_explorer
item.description: A basic mlocate db file explorer

item.title: Enough-Software/enough_mail_app
item.description: Mail app for iOS, Android and hopefully more platforms in the future. Based on Flutter.

item.title: arran4/dart_xdg_status_notifier_item
item.description: Allows status notifications (i.e. system tray) on Linux desktops using the StatusNotifierItem specification.

item.title: oi-narendra/multiselect-dropdown
item.description: Streamlined Flutter widget for versatile multi-selection with extensive customization.

item.title: arran4/Dimension
item.description: (Beta) Peer-to-peer group chat and file transfer.

item.title: jpnurmi/awesome-flutter-linux
item.description: A curated list of awesome Linux-specific Flutter packages and projects.

item.title: arran4/dart_unix_single_instance
item.description: A library which uses unix sockets to ensure a single instance

item.title: arran4/lemmy_notify
item.description: Lemmy Notification app - for desktop atm

item.title: arran4/flutter_google_datastore
item.description: Google Datastore and Datastore emulator client for “easy” modification of values

item.title: arran4/flutter_jules
item.description: My flutter based google jules client

item.title: theideasaler/calendar_date_picker2
item.description: Lightweight and highly customizable calendar picker built on Flutter’s original CalendarDatePicker, with support for multi and range modes.

item.title: kra-mo/Sly
item.description: Mirrored from https://codeberg.org/kramo/Sly

item.title: krishnakumarcn/faded
item.description: Client did not pay? Add opacity to widgets and decrease it every day until their app completely fades away. Set a due date and customize the number of days you offer them until the app is fully vanished.

item.title: afonsocraposo/buttons_tabbar
item.description: A Flutter package that implements a TabBar where each label is a toggle button.

item.title: marioreggiori/objectdb
item.description: Persistent embedded document-oriented NoSQL database for Dart and Flutter.

item.title: fosscom/objectdb_flutter
item.description: Flutter ObjectDB listener with reactive store

item.title: Nimrodda/flutter_nsd
item.description: A Flutter plugin that enables Network Service Discovery (mDNS) on various platforms via their native APIs.
